mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO analysis_results (video_id, sequence_index, start_time_ms, end_time_ms, technique, is_dynamic, confidence, model_version) VALUES
(#{r.videoId}, #{r.sequenceIndex}, #{r.startTimeMs}, #{r.endTimeMs}, #{r.technique}, #{r.isDynamic}, #{r.confidence}, #{r.modelVersion})
mapper.select: SELECT id, video_id, sequence_index, start_time_ms, end_time_ms, technique, is_dynamic, confidence, model_version, created_at FROM analysis_results WHERE video_id = #{videoId} ORDER BY sequence_index ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO analysis_video_results ( video_id, model_version, ai_techniques, ai_is_dynamic, ai_dynamic_probability, final_techniques, final_is_dynamic, feedback_applied, feedback_note, corrected_by, corrected_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{videoId}, #{modelVersion}, #{aiTechniques}::jsonb, #{aiIsDynamic}, #{aiDynamicProbability}, #{finalTechniques}::jsonb, #{finalIsDynamic}, #{feedbackApplied}, NULL, NULL, NULL, NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (video_id) DO UPDATE SET model_version = EXCLUDED.model_version, ai_techniques = EXCLUDED.ai_techniques, ai_is_dynamic = EXCLUDED.ai_is_dynamic, ai_dynamic_probability = EXCLUDED.ai_dynamic_probability, final_techniques = EXCLUDED.final_techniques, final_is_dynamic = EXCLUDED.final_is_dynamic, feedback_applied = FALSE, feedback_note = NULL, corrected_by = NULL, corrected_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT video_id, model_version, ai_techniques::text AS ai_techniques, ai_is_dynamic, ai_dynamic_probability, final_techniques::text AS final_techniques, final_is_dynamic, feedback_applied, feedback_note, corrected_by, corrected_at, created_at, updated_at FROM analysis_video_results WHERE video_id = #{videoId}
mapper.update: UPDATE analysis_video_results SET final_techniques = #{finalTechniques}::jsonb, final_is_dynamic = #{finalIsDynamic}, feedback_applied = TRUE, feedback_note = #{feedbackNote}, corrected_by = #{correctedBy}, corrected_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE video_id = #{videoId}
mapper.select: SELECT video_id, model_version, ai_techniques::text AS ai_techniques, ai_is_dynamic, ai_dynamic_probability, final_techniques::text AS final_techniques, final_is_dynamic, feedback_applied, feedback_note, corrected_by, corrected_at, created_at, updated_at FROM analysis_video_results WHERE model_version = #{modelVersion} AND feedback_applied = TRUE ORDER BY video_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO labels (video_id, user_id, technique, is_correct) VALUES (#{videoId}, #{userId}, #{technique}, #{isCorrect})
